meaning: adj.粗俗幽默的,法国讽刺作家拉伯雷的
examples: At ease across many media, Liu has developed an artistic language that is Rabelaisian in its carnivalesque qualities.
He was a Rabelaisian figure in the Senate and in life, instantly recognizable by his shock of white hair, his florid, oversize face, his booming Boston brogue, his powerful but pained stride.
He was a Rabelaisian sensualist, not a Balzacian crook.
